summary: Voice functionality testing on Mira Demo page complete. TTS (ElevenLabs), microphone input, and voice toggle all working correctly. Login flow and chat messaging verified.

minor.issue: Returns 520 CDN error for empty/whitespace-only text instead of 400 Bad Request

context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice functionality on Mira Demo page is fully working. TTS uses ElevenLabs API with multiple voice personalities (default, celebration, health, comfort, urgent). Voice toggle (.mp-btn-voice) and mic button (.mp-btn-mic) are visible and functional. Chat messaging sends to /api/mira/chat and responses trigger voice playback when voice is enabled.
features_verified: TTS (Text-to-Speech) voice output - ElevenLabs generates audio, plays on Mira responses
Microphone voice input button - visible and enters recording state
Chat messaging - send messages and receive Mira responses
Login flow - credentials dipali@clubconcierge.in / lola4304 work
Voice toggle button - enable/disable voice output
Header visibility - stable, Mira branding visible
Quick reply buttons - work without page reset
